name: USS Brush (DD 745)
events: 30 Aug 1944 USS Brush arrived at Pearl Harbor.
20 Sep 1944 USS Brush departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Eniwetok.
17 Dec 1944 USS Iowa (Capt. J.L. Holloway, Jr., USN), topped off two of the destroyers of the Task Group, USS Brush (Cdr. J.E. Edwards, USN) and USS Lewis Hancock (Cdr. W.M. Searles, USN), with fuel.
13 Jun 1945 USS Brush arrived at Leyte.
13 Jun 1945 USS Brush departed from Leyte to join the fleet again.
14 Sep 1945 USS Brush arrived at Tokyo Bay.
